datasetSectionHeader.value: Dataset Configuration

datasetSelector.label: HuggingFace Dataset
datasetSelector.name: dataset_id
datasetSelector.help: Search for datasets with real-time Hub API integration

datasetDownloadedSelector.label: Downloaded Dataset
datasetDownloadedSelector.name: dataset_id
datasetDownloadedSelector.help: Select from your previously downloaded datasets

datasetUpload.label: Dataset File
datasetUpload.name: dataset_file
datasetUpload.help: Upload your dataset file (CSV, JSON, JSONL, TXT)

inputText.label: Custom Input Text
inputText.name: input_text
inputText.help: Enter text for inference when not using a dataset
inputText.placeholder: Enter your text here for inference...

datasetProcessingHeader.value: Dataset Processing

inputColumn.label: Input Column
inputColumn.name: input_column
inputColumn.help: Specify which column contains the input data for training

targetColumn.label: Target Column
targetColumn.name: target_column
targetColumn.help: Specify which column contains the target/output data for training

textColumn.label: Text Column
textColumn.name: text_column
textColumn.help: Column containing the text to classify

labelColumn.label: Label Column
labelColumn.name: label_column
labelColumn.help: Column containing the class labels (must be integers or will be converted)

numLabels.label: Number of Classes
numLabels.name: num_labels
numLabels.help: Number of unique classes in your dataset. Leave as 2 for binary classification.

showDatasetProcessing.label: Advanced Settings
showDatasetProcessing.name: show_dataset_processing
showDatasetProcessing.help: Enable advanced dataset processing options like validation, preprocessing, and custom formatting

dataPreview.value: Select a dataset to view columns and sample data

dataSplitHeader.value: Data Split Configuration

showDataSplit.label: Configure Data Splits
showDataSplit.name: show_data_split
showDataSplit.help: Set up train/validation splits and data filtering

trainSplitRatio.label: Train Split Ratio
trainSplitRatio.name: train_split_ratio
trainSplitRatio.help: Percentage of data to use for training (0.0 to 1.0)

validationSplitRatio.label: Validation Split Ratio
validationSplitRatio.name: validation_split_ratio
validationSplitRatio.help: Percentage of data to use for validation (0.0 to 1.0)

maxSamples.label: Max Samples
maxSamples.name: max_train_samples
maxSamples.help: Maximum number of samples to use for training (0 = use all)

shuffleData.label: Shuffle Data
shuffleData.name: shuffle_data
shuffleData.help: Randomly shuffle the dataset before splitting

randomSeed.label: Random Seed
randomSeed.name: random_seed
randomSeed.help: Seed for reproducible data splitting (0 = random)
